seed_instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same?
org_constraint: The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email must contain a minimum of 200 words, with each paragraph limited to a maximum of 60 words.
instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same? The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email must contain a minimum of 200 words, with each paragraph limited to a maximum of 60 words.
response:
Subject: Invitation to Start Our New Book Club

Dear friends, I am thrilled to propose forming a new book club among us. Reading together has always been a cherished tradition that brings us closer. I believe sharing our thoughts on great stories will create wonderful memories. Let us embark on this literary journey together soon.

We plan to meet monthly at my place for coffee and conversation. Each month, we will select a different book to discuss in depth. This format allows everyone to share their unique perspectives freely. We aim to foster an inclusive environment where every voice matters.

Please let me know if you are interested by the end of this week. Your enthusiasm is crucial for making this group a success. Together, we can explore diverse genres and challenge our own views. I look forward to hearing from you and starting this exciting adventure.
